arts.ttl: Matheus Cunha to Arsenal transfer takes twist as Premier League rivals plot audacious bid
arts.sum: Wolves forward Matheus Cunha is attracting interest from a number of Premier League clubs and Nottingham Forest have now emerged as a contender as they look to boost their top four bid

arts.ttl: Arsenal receive Mbeumo transfer green light after Forest make Cunha decision
arts.sum: football.london says: While Arteta will certainly want an attacking addition imminently, this set of transfer dominos could set Arsenal up well to sign Mbeumo in the summer. With that being said, football.london has rounded up the latest Arsenal transfer news and rumours during the January window.

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Gunners suffer Dusan Vlahovic blow amid £67m Benjamin Sesko dilemma
arts.sum: Arsenal have less than two weeks to bolster Mikel Arteta's squad before the January transfer window closes, with the Gunners being urged to sign a new striker amid their fading Premier League title hopes

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Dinamo Zagreb: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Previewing Arsenal vs Dinamo Zagreb in the Champions League on Wednesday, including team news, predictions and how to watch on TV.

arts.ttl: Report: Nottingham Forest make Arsenal target their top January priority
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest have reportedly made Wolves forward Matheus Cunha their top priority for the January transfer window as they aim to strengthen their squad and push for a top-four finish. The City Ground club are eager to sign a new attacker before the transfer deadline, with the Daily Mail revealing that Cunha is identified as […] The post Report: Nottingham Forest make Arsenal target their top January priority appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Teenage boy arrested over social media abuse of Kai Havertz’s pregnant wife
arts.sum: Havertz missed decisive penalty in Arsenal’s FA Cup exit Sophia Havertz reposted two messages she had received Police have arrested a teenage boy in connection with social media abuse sent to Arsenal forward Kai Havertz’s pregnant wife. Sophia Havertz, who is expecting her first child with the Germany international, reposted two messages she had received on Instagram after Arsenal’s FA Cup defeat against Manchester United on 15 January. Havertz missed the decisive spot-kick in the penalty shootout which cemented his side’s third-round exit. Arsenal tasked the data technology company Signify with determining the identity of the abusers. The police then launched an investigation and confirmed on Tuesday an individual had been detained. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta turns to tunes to ‘change our mood’ before Arsenal’s Zagreb test
arts.sum: Club training to music after setback of Aston Villa draw ‘You play a song and immediately you feel different’ Mikel Arteta is hoping the sound of music can help Arsenal seal a place in the top eight of the Champions League and has urged his players to take out the frustration of letting slip a two-goal lead against Aston Villa when they face Dinamo Zagreb on Wednesday night. Victory against the Croatian side would put Arsenal on the verge of qualifying directly for the last 16 with a trip to Girona next week in their final fixture to come. Arsenal will again be without William Saliba after the Frenchman missed the draw against Villa on Saturday with a hamstring strain, although Arteta said the defender was “evolving well”. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta takes on new Arsenal role in unique preparation for Champions League clash
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has installed giant speakers at Arsenal's training ground ahead of their Champions League clash with Croatian side Dinamo Zagreb on Wednesday evening

arts.ttl: Sesko and Osimhen deals agreed as £52m star signs in dream Arsenal window
arts.sum: Martin Zubimendi is a player football.london understands Arsenal are already working to bring in for the summer, so reaching an agreement before the end of this window would make sense. Arsenal signing a striker this winter transfer window no longer appears to be the stuff of dreams.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta makes William Saliba return promise ahead of Arsenal clash with Man City
arts.sum: William Saliba has been confirmed to be ready to return before Arsenal take on Manchester City, but will miss the clash with Dinamo Zagreb. On Saliba, Arteta was asked about whether he could be back for Manchester City and he replied, "Yes, we hope so."
